Test Case/Summary: Valid credentials reach the secure area
Description: Login with correct username and password; verify redirect to /secure and success flash.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login. 2. Fill #username with tomsmith. 3. Fill #password with SuperSecretPassword!. 4. Click button[type=submit]. 5. Assert .flash.success contains 'You logged into a secure area'. 6. Assert URL matches /secure.
Expected outcome: Redirected to /secure; .flash.success visible with text 'You logged into a secure area'

Test Case/Summary: Invalid credentials show an error
Description: Login with wrong username/password; verify error flash is shown and user stays on /login.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login. 2. Fill #username with invalid-user. 3. Fill #password with wrong-password. 4. Click button[type=submit]. 5. Assert .flash.error contains 'Your username is invalid'.
Expected outcome: Error flash visible with text 'Your username is invalid'; remains on /login

Test Case/Summary: Homepage loads and lists all feature links
Description: Navigate to / and verify the page title and feature link list are present.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /. 2. Assert page title contains 'The Internet'. 3. Assert heading contains 'Welcome to the-internet'. 4. Assert at least one <a> link is visible in #content ul li.
Expected outcome: Page loads; title correct; at least one feature link visible

Test Case/Summary: Checkboxes — check and uncheck
Description: Navigate to /checkboxes; toggle both checkboxes and verify state.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkboxes. 2. Assert two checkboxes exist. 3. Click checkbox 1 and assert its checked state toggles. 4. Click checkbox 2 and assert its checked state toggles.
Expected outcome: Checkbox states update correctly on each click

Test Case/Summary: Dropdown — select each option
Description: Navigate to /dropdown; select each option and verify the selection.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dropdown. 2. Select 'Option 1' from #dropdown. 3. Assert value is '1'. 4. Select 'Option 2'. 5. Assert value is '2'.
Expected outcome: Selected option reflects user choice; value attribute matches selection

Test Case/Summary: Dynamic content loads new content on reload
Description: Navigate to /dynamic_content; capture text of first content block; reload and assert at least one block content changes.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dynamic_content. 2. Capture innerText of first .large-4.columns. 3. Reload page. 4. Wait for .large-4.columns to be visible. 5. Assert at least one content block text differs from the captured value.
Expected outcome: At least one content block changes after reload (random content confirmed dynamic)

Test Case/Summary: Disappearing elements — element visibility
Description: Navigate to /disappearing_elements; assert nav links are visible and count is at least 1.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /disappearing_elements. 2. Assert ul li a first item is visible. 3. Assert count of ul li a is greater than 0.
Expected outcome: Nav link list is visible with at least one item

Test Case/Summary: Form authentication — logout from secure area
Description: After logging in navigate to /secure; click Logout and verify redirect back to /login with success flash.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login and log in with valid credentials. 2. Assert URL ends in /secure. 3. Click Logout link. 4. Assert URL ends in /login. 5. Assert .flash.success contains 'You logged out of the secure area'.
Expected outcome: User logged out; redirected to /login; success flash visible. BR-003

Test Case/Summary: File download — link is present and downloadable
Description: Navigate to /download; assert at least one downloadable file link is present.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /download. 2. Assert at least one <a> with href containing /download/ is visible. 3. Assert count greater than 0.
Expected outcome: File download links are visible on the page

Test Case/Summary: File upload — upload a file successfully
Description: Navigate to /upload; upload a temp file and verify the success heading.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /upload. 2. Create a temp .txt file on disk. 3. Set input[type=file] to that file path. 4. Click #file-submit. 5. Assert heading 'File Uploaded!' is visible. 6. Delete temp file.
Expected outcome: 'File Uploaded!' heading is shown after submission

Test Case/Summary: Infinite scroll — page scrolls and loads more content
Description: Navigate to /infinite_scroll; scroll to bottom and assert new paragraph content is appended.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /infinite_scroll. 2. Count initial p elements. 3. Scroll to bottom via window.scrollTo. 4. Wait for new p elements (waitForFunction not waitForTimeout). 5. Assert final p count is greater than initial.
Expected outcome: New paragraph content appears after scrolling; count increases

Test Case/Summary: Drag and drop — drag column A onto column B
Description: Navigate to /drag_and_drop; drag column A to column B and verify headers swap.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /drag_and_drop. 2. Capture header text of #column-a and #column-b. 3. dragTo #column-a onto #column-b. 4. Assert #column-a header equals former B header. 5. Assert #column-b header equals former A header.
Expected outcome: Column headers swap after drag and drop operation

Test Case/Summary: Hovers — reveal hidden caption on hover
Description: Navigate to /hovers; hover over first .figure and verify hidden caption appears.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /hovers. 2. Hover over first .figure element. 3. Assert .figcaption inside that figure is visible. 4. Assert caption text contains 'user'.
Expected outcome: Caption containing 'user' is visible after hover

Test Case/Summary: Inputs — number input accepts and retains numeric value
Description: Navigate to /inputs; type 42 and assert the field retains it.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /inputs. 2. Click the number input. 3. Type '42'. 4. Assert input value is '42'.
Expected outcome: Input field displays the entered number 42

Test Case/Summary: Key presses — keypress is recorded
Description: Navigate to /key_presses; press a key and verify it is displayed in #result.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /key_presses. 2. Click #target input. 3. Press keyboard key 'A'. 4. Assert #result contains 'You entered: A'.
Expected outcome: Result element shows 'You entered: A'

Test Case/Summary: JavaScript alerts — accept JS alert
Description: Navigate to /javascript_alerts; register dialog handler to accept; click Alert button; verify #result.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /javascript_alerts. 2. Register page.once('dialog') handler to accept. 3. Click 'Click for JS Alert' button. 4. Assert #result contains 'You successfully clicked an alert'.
Expected outcome: Alert accepted; #result shows 'You successfully clicked an alert'

Test Case/Summary: JavaScript alerts — confirm dialog accepted
Description: Navigate to /javascript_alerts; register handler to accept confirm; click Confirm button; verify #result.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /javascript_alerts. 2. Register page.once('dialog') handler to accept. 3. Click 'Click for JS Confirm'. 4. Assert #result contains 'You clicked: Ok'.
Expected outcome: Confirm accepted; #result shows 'You clicked: Ok'

Test Case/Summary: JavaScript alerts — prompt dialog with text entry
Description: Navigate to /javascript_alerts; register handler to accept prompt with text 'Playwright'; verify #result.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /javascript_alerts. 2. Register page.once('dialog') handler to accept with value 'Playwright'. 3. Click 'Click for JS Prompt'. 4. Assert #result contains 'You entered: Playwright'.
Expected outcome: Prompt accepted with text; #result shows 'You entered: Playwright'

Test Case/Summary: Frames — nested frames load correctly
Description: Navigate to /nested_frames; assert top/bottom/left/middle/right frames all exist.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /nested_frames. 2. Assert frame named 'frame-top' is not null. 3. Assert frames named 'frame-left', 'frame-middle', 'frame-right' are not null. 4. Assert frame named 'frame-bottom' is not null and body has text content.
Expected outcome: All 5 named frames are present and bottom frame has text

Test Case/Summary: iFrame — type text into TinyMCE editor
Description: Navigate to /iframe; clear TinyMCE body and type 'Hello Playwright'; verify text is present.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /iframe. 2. Get frameLocator('#mce_0_ifr'). 3. Click body#tinymce. 4. Press Ctrl+A to select all. 5. Type 'Hello Playwright'. 6. Assert body#tinymce contains 'Hello Playwright'.
Expected outcome: TinyMCE body contains 'Hello Playwright' after typing

Test Case/Summary: Dynamic controls — enable/disable text input
Description: Navigate to /dynamic_controls; click Enable; assert input is enabled; click Disable; assert input is disabled.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dynamic_controls. 2. Click 'Enable' button. 3. Wait for #loading to be hidden. 4. Assert form#input-example input[type=text] is enabled. 5. Click 'Disable'. 6. Wait for #loading to be hidden. 7. Assert input is disabled.
Expected outcome: Input toggles between enabled and disabled states correctly

Test Case/Summary: Dynamic controls — add/remove checkbox
Description: Navigate to /dynamic_controls; click Remove; assert checkbox gone; click Add; assert checkbox present.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dynamic_controls. 2. Click 'Remove' button. 3. Wait for #loading to be hidden. 4. Assert checkbox count is 0. 5. Click 'Add'. 6. Wait for #loading to be hidden. 7. Assert checkbox count is 1.
Expected outcome: Checkbox is removed then added back via dynamic controls

Test Case/Summary: Dynamic loading 1 — hidden element revealed after start
Description: Navigate to /dynamic_loading/1; click Start; wait for #finish h4 to be visible; assert text.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dynamic_loading/1. 2. Click #start button. 3. Wait for #finish h4 to be visible (timeout 15s). 4. Assert #finish h4 text is 'Hello World!'.
Expected outcome: 'Hello World!' text appears in #finish h4 after loading

Test Case/Summary: Dynamic loading 2 — element rendered after start
Description: Navigate to /dynamic_loading/2; click Start; wait for #finish h4 to render; assert text.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dynamic_loading/2. 2. Click #start button. 3. Wait for #finish h4 to be visible (timeout 15s). 4. Assert #finish h4 text is 'Hello World!'.
Expected outcome: 'Hello World!' text is rendered in #finish h4 after loading

Test Case/Summary: Broken images — page loads at HTTP 200
Description: Navigate to /broken_images; assert HTTP 200 response and at least one img element present.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /broken_images. 2. Assert response status is 200. 3. Assert at least one img element exists on the page.
Expected outcome: Page returns 200; img elements present in DOM

Test Case/Summary: Status codes — 200 page
Description: Navigate to /status_codes; click the 200 link; verify status code message.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /status_codes. 2. Click link '200'. 3. Assert page body contains 'This page returned a 200 status code'.
Expected outcome: Body contains '200 status code' message

Test Case/Summary: Status codes — 301 redirect page
Description: Navigate to /status_codes; click the 301 link; verify status code message.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /status_codes. 2. Click link '301'. 3. Assert page body contains 'This page returned a 301 status code'.
Expected outcome: Body contains '301 status code' message

Test Case/Summary: Status codes — 404 page
Description: Navigate to /status_codes; click the 404 link; verify status code message.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /status_codes. 2. Click link '404'. 3. Assert page body contains 'This page returned a 404 status code'.
Expected outcome: Body contains '404 status code' message

Test Case/Summary: Status codes — 500 page
Description: Navigate to /status_codes; click the 500 link; verify status code message.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /status_codes. 2. Click link '500'. 3. Assert page body contains 'This page returned a 500 status code'.
Expected outcome: Body contains '500 status code' message

Test Case/Summary: Notification messages — random flash appears on action
Description: Navigate to /notification_message_rendered; click the link; assert .flash is visible.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /notification_message_rendered. 2. Click 'Click here' link. 3. Assert .flash is visible.
Expected outcome: Flash notification message is visible on the page

Test Case/Summary: Floating menu — menu stays visible after scroll
Description: Navigate to /floating_menu; scroll to page bottom via JS; assert #menu is still visible.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /floating_menu. 2. Execute window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight). 3. Assert #menu is visible.
Expected outcome: #menu element remains visible after scrolling to bottom

Test Case/Summary: Forgot password — form loads and submits successfully
Description: Navigate to /forgot_password; enter email and submit; assert redirect to /email_sent.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /forgot_password. 2. Fill #email with 'test@example.com'. 3. Click #form_submit. 4. Assert URL contains /email_sent.
Expected outcome: Page redirects to /email_sent after form submission

Test Case/Summary: Redirect link — follows redirect to /status_codes
Description: Navigate to /redirector; click the redirect link; assert final URL ends in /status_codes.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /redirector. 2. Click 'here' link. 3. Assert final URL matches /status_codes.
Expected outcome: URL ends in /status_codes after following the redirect

Test Case/Summary: Slow resources — page eventually loads within extended timeout
Description: Navigate to /slow with 45s timeout; assert body is visible on load.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /slow with { timeout: 45000 }. 2. Assert page.locator('body') is visible.
Expected outcome: Page body visible; load completes within 45 seconds

Test Case/Summary: Add/Remove elements — add then remove element
Description: Navigate to /add_remove_elements/; click Add Element; assert Delete button appears; click Delete; assert it is gone.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /add_remove_elements/. 2. Click 'Add Element' button. 3. Assert 'Delete' button is visible. 4. Click 'Delete'. 5. Assert 'Delete' button count is 0.
Expected outcome: Delete button appears after Add; disappears after Delete click

Test Case/Summary: Multiple windows — opens new window with correct heading
Description: Navigate to /windows; listen for new page event; click 'Click Here'; assert new window URL and heading.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /windows. 2. Set up context.waitForEvent('page') promise. 3. Click 'Click Here' link. 4. Await new page. 5. Wait for load state. 6. Assert new page URL contains /windows/new. 7. Assert heading 'New Window' is visible.
Expected outcome: New window opens with URL /windows/new and heading 'New Window'

Test Case/Summary: Exit intent — modal appears on mouse leave
Description: Navigate to /exit_intent; dispatch mouseleave event on document; assert .modal is visible.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /exit_intent. 2. Execute page.evaluate to dispatch 'mouseleave' MouseEvent on document with clientY:0. 3. Assert .modal is visible within 5s.
Expected outcome: Modal element (.modal) is visible after exit intent trigger

Test Case/Summary: Context menu — right-click triggers browser dialog
Description: Navigate to /context_menu; register dialog handler to accept; right-click #hot-spot; assert no error.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /context_menu. 2. Register page.once('dialog') to accept. 3. Right-click #hot-spot. 4. Assert dialog was fired (no unhandled dialog error). 5. Assert page body is still visible.
Expected outcome: Context menu dialog fires without error; page remains stable

Test Case/Summary: Geolocation — prompt triggered or coordinates shown
Description: Navigate to /geolocation; click 'Where am I?'; assert #lat/#long populated or button click succeeds.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /geolocation. 2. Click 'Where am I?' button. 3. Assert either #lat and #long have non-empty text OR page remains stable without error.
Expected outcome: Geolocation prompt fires (or coordinates populate if granted) without JS error

Test Case/Summary: Secure file download — unauthenticated access redirects to login
Description: Navigate to /download_secure without logging in; assert redirect to /login. BR-004.
Test Steps: 1. Ensure no active session (fresh context). 2. Navigate to /download_secure. 3. Assert URL contains /login OR HTTP response is 401/403.
Expected outcome: Unauthenticated request to /download_secure redirected to /login. BR-004
